title: Qubit Readout: Dispersive Measurement and Beyond
description: Learn how superconducting qubits are measured through dispersive coupling to microwave resonators. Understand the physics of quantum non-demolition measurement, readout fidelity, and measurement-induced decoherence.
learningObjectives: Explain the dispersive coupling regime and its role in qubit readout
Derive the state-dependent frequency shift of the readout resonator
Understand the trade-offs between readout fidelity and measurement-induced dephasing
Calculate readout fidelity from signal-to-noise considerations
Compare different readout techniques and their advantages
